mainEntity.name: Can family members claim benefits if a worker dies from respiratory disease in Midvale?
mainEntity.text: Can family members claim benefits if a worker dies from respiratory disease in Midvale?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah death benefits provide 66⅔% wages to dependents for 8 years max or until age 62, plus burial costs up to $10K if work caused fatal asbestosis or similar.

suggestedAnswer.text: Midvale mining widows file within 1 year of death. Prove causation via autopsy/IME. Benefits offset by SSDI. Children qualify till 18. Disputes common; 40% settle pre-hearing.

name: Family Death Benefits for Respiratory Diseases in Midvale
